name: figma-mcp-express
description: Compact Figma MCP with validated batch ops through a local plugin bridge.

tools.name: list_channels
tools.description: List connected Figma files/channels.

tools.name: set_presence
tools.description: Update Watch-agent status/task without touching Figma.

tools.name: batch
tools.description: Run ordered BatchOpCatalog ops in one plugin round trip.

tools.name: search_batch_ops
tools.description: Search BatchOpCatalog by intent, op name, category, or param key.

tools.name: get_batch_op_spec
tools.description: Return the live schema for one BatchOpCatalog op.

tools.name: get_metadata
tools.description: Lightweight file/page map.

tools.name: get_pages
tools.description: List pages with ids and names.

tools.name: get_selection
tools.description: Return currently selected nodes.

tools.name: get_node
tools.description: Read one node by id.

tools.name: get_nodes_info
tools.description: Read multiple known node ids in one call.

tools.name: get_design_context
tools.description: Token-efficient tree for selection, page, or subtree.

tools.name: search_nodes
tools.description: Find nodes by name substring and optional type filter.

tools.name: scan_text_nodes
tools.description: List TEXT nodes and copy in a scoped subtree.

tools.name: scan_nodes_by_types
tools.description: List nodes of requested Figma types in a scoped subtree.

tools.name: save_screenshots
tools.description: Export node screenshots to local files.

tools.name: export_frames_to_pdf
tools.description: Export selected/provided frames as one PDF payload.

tools.name: get_styles
tools.description: List local paint, text, effect, and grid styles.

tools.name: get_variable_defs
tools.description: List local variable collections, modes, variables, and values.

tools.name: get_local_components
tools.description: List local components and component sets.

tools.name: export_tokens
tools.description: Export local variables and paint styles as design tokens.

tools.name: list_library_variable_collections
tools.description: List subscribed-library variable collections and modes.

tools.name: fetch_library_catalog
tools.description: Fetch a published Figma library catalog through REST.
